text_instructions: This Genie Space contains manufacturing operations data from the PE002 system, focusing on production efficiency and workforce metrics across different plants and workcenters. The data includes key operational measures such as active shift hours, total hours, paid and unpaid hours, theoretical line hours at rated speed, and production quantities. You can analyze efficiency metrics like EPL (Equipment Performance Loss) and OPL (Overall Performance Loss), as well as CO and CIP (Changeover and Cleaning in Place) activities. The dimensions allow you to slice data by plant workcenter, workcenter type, and various pivot columns for detailed analysis. When querying this data, use the MEASURE() function to aggregate metrics properly - for example, MEASURE(production_quantity) will sum production quantities across your selected dimensions. You can ask questions about production output, efficiency trends, workforce utilization, and operational performance across different plants and workcenters. The data supports analysis of manufacturing KPIs, capacity planning, and operational optimization initiatives.
sample_questions:
What is the total production quantity by plant workcenter?
Which workcenters have the highest active shift hours?
Show me EPL and OPL metrics by workcenter type
What are the paid vs unpaid hours across all plants?
Which plant workcenter has the best production efficiency?
Compare theoretical line hours to actual total hours by workcenter
What is the CO and CIP time by workcenter type?
Show production quantity PHC by plant workcenter
Which workcenters have the most unpaid hours?
What is the ratio of active shift hours to total hours?
Compare EPL across different workcenter types
Show me production output trends by plant
What are the top performing workcenters by production quantity?
Analyze workforce utilization across plants
Which workcenters need operational improvement based on OPL?
example_sqls_json: [{"question": "What is the total production quantity by plant workcenter?", "sql": "SELECT plant_workcenter_key, MEASURE(production_quantity) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY plant_workcenter_key"}, {"question": "Show EPL and OPL metrics by workcenter type", "sql": "SELECT bic_cwc_type, MEASURE(epl), MEASURE(opl) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY bic_cwc_type"}, {"question": "Compare paid vs unpaid hours across workcenters", "sql": "SELECT plant_workcenter_key, MEASURE(paid_hours), MEASURE(unpaid_hours) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY plant_workcenter_key"}, {"question": "What are the active shift hours by workcenter type?", "sql": "SELECT bic_cwc_type, MEASURE(active_shift_hours) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY bic_cwc_type"}, {"question": "Show CO and CIP time by plant workcenter", "sql": "SELECT plant_workcenter_key, MEASURE(co_and_cip) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY plant_workcenter_key"}, {"question": "Compare theoretical vs total hours by workcenter", "sql": "SELECT workcenter_txtmd, MEASURE(theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed), MEASURE(total_hours) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY workcenter_txtmd"}, {"question": "What is the production quantity PHC by workcenter type?", "sql": "SELECT bic_cwc_type, MEASURE(production_quantity_phc) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY bic_cwc_type"}, {"question": "Show all key metrics by plant workcenter", "sql": "SELECT plant_workcenter_key, MEASURE(production_quantity), MEASURE(epl), MEASURE(opl), MEASURE(active_shift_hours) FROM david_test_metrics.ucmv_kasal.fact_pe002 GROUP BY plant_workcenter_key"}]

source: |-
  SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS sc_kpe00201, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS sc_kpe00202, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS sc_kpe00213, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS sc_kpe00214, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS sc_kpe00261, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS sc_kpe00262
  FROM (
  SELECT
    cal.fiscper,
    comp_code,
    plant_workcenter_key,
    plant,
    SUM(active_shift_hours) AS active_shift_hours,
    SUM(total_hours) AS total_hours,
    SUM(paid_hours) AS paid_hours,
    SUM(unpaid_hours) AS unpaid_hours,
    SUM(theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed) AS theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed,
    SUM(epl) AS epl,
    SUM(opl) AS opl,
    SUM(co_and_cip) AS co_and_cip,
    SUM(production_quantity) AS production_quantity,
    SUM(production_quantity_phc) AS production_quantity_phc,
    SUM(theoretical_line_hours_restricted_speed) AS theoretical_line_hours_restricted_speed,
    SUM(hours_idleinactive) AS hours_idleinactive,
    SUM(maintenance_and_setup) AS maintenance_and_setup,
    SUM(scheduled_maintenance) AS scheduled_maintenance,
    SUM(lineproduct_validation) AS lineproduct_validation,
    SUM(lost_time) AS lost_time,
    SUM(speed_losses) AS speed_losses,
    SUM(minor_stoppages) AS minor_stoppages,
    SUM(number_of_bb_stoppages) AS number_of_bb_stoppages,
    SUM(total_downtime_hours) AS total_downtime_hours,
    SUM(plh_000_hidden) AS plh_000_hidden
    FROM  david_test_metrics.udm_datamart_ftd.pe002_line_performance_actuals AS pe002
    LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_CUSTOMER_md__ca_faccal_calendar AS cal ON pe002.calday = cal.calday
    LEFT JOIN david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_CUSTOMER_md__ca_0_mat03_material AS mat
    ON pe002.material = mat.material
    WHERE
    cal.fiscper >= CONCAT(CAST(YEAR(CURRENT_DATE()) - 2 AS STRING), '001')
    GROUP BY
    cal.fiscper,
    comp_code,
    plant_workcenter_key,
    plant
  ) _primary_source
  WHERE comp_code NOT IN ('0403', '0550', '0307')
  UNION ALL
  SELECT *, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS active_shift_hours, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS total_hours, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS paid_hours, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS unpaid_hours, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS epl, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS opl, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS co_and_cip, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS production_quantity, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS production_quantity_phc, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS theoretical_line_hours_restricted_speed, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS hours_idleinactive, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS maintenance_and_setup, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS scheduled_maintenance, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS lineproduct_validation, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS lost_time, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS speed_losses, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS minor_stoppages, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS number_of_bb_stoppages, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS total_downtime_hours, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE) AS plh_000_hidden
  FROM (
  SELECT CONCAT(plant, '/', workcenter) AS plant_workcenter_key, plant, fiscper, comp_code,
      SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00201' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00201,
      SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00202' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00202,
      SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00213' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00213,
      SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00214' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00214,
      SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00261' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00261,
      SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00262' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00262
  FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_mdm__ca_kbi52r_maa_sub_kbis_rt
  WHERE bic_chversion = '0000' AND comp_code IN ('0403', '0550', '0307')
  GROUP BY plant, workcenter, fiscper, comp_code
  ) _union_arm

joins:
  - name: sc_bp
    source: |-
      SELECT plant, workcenter, fiscper, comp_code,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00201' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00201,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00202' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00202,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00213' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00213,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00214' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00214,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00240' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00240,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00246' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00246,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00252' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00252,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00261' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00261,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00262' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00262
      FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_mdm__ca_kbi52r_maa_sub_kbis_rt
      WHERE bic_chversion = 'B000'
      GROUP BY plant, workcenter, fiscper, comp_code
    "on": "source.plant_workcenter_key = CONCAT(sc_bp.plant, '/', sc_bp.workcenter)"
  - name: dim_wkctr
    source: david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_CUSTOMER_md__ca_dim_workcenter
    "on": source.plant_workcenter_key = dim_wkctr.plant_workcenter_key

comment: |-
  PE002 — UC Metric View (fact_pe002)
  Auto-generated from MQuery Conversion Report + DAX translation.
  
  Source: dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_CUSTOMER_md__ca_dim_workcenter
  Target catalog/schema: david_test_metrics.test_schema
  
  21 base measures (from MQuery SUM columns)
  2 DAX-translated measures
  18 SWITCH-decomposed measures
  0 untranslatable DAX measures (documented below)

# ─── Joins ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

joins:
  - name: sc_bp
    source: |-
      SELECT plant, workcenter, fiscper, comp_code,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00201' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00201,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00202' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00202,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00213' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00213,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00214' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00214,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00240' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00240,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00246' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00246,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00252' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00252,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00261' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00261,
          SUM(CASE WHEN bic_csubkbi = 'KPE00262' THEN fltp END) AS sc_kpe00262
      FROM david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__curated_cch_bw_mdm__ca_kbi52r_maa_sub_kbis_rt
      WHERE bic_chversion = 'B000'
      GROUP BY plant, workcenter, fiscper, comp_code
    "on": "source.plant_workcenter_key = CONCAT(sc_bp.plant, '/', sc_bp.workcenter)"
  - name: dim_wkctr
    source: david_test_metrics.test_schema.dc_datalake_prod_001__udm_CUSTOMER_md__ca_dim_workcenter
    "on": source.plant_workcenter_key = dim_wkctr.plant_workcenter_key

# ─── Dimensions ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

dimensions:
  - name: plant_workcenter_key
    expr: source.plant_workcenter_key
    comment: Plant workcenter key
    display_name: Plant Workcenter Key
  - name: bic_cwc_type
    expr: dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type
    comment: Bic cwc type from dim_wkctr
    display_name: Bic Cwc Type
  - name: workcenter_txtmd
    expr: dim_wkctr.workcenter_txtmd
    comment: Workcenter txtmd from dim_wkctr
    display_name: Workcenter Txtmd
  - name: sc_kpe00201
    expr: source.sc_kpe00201
    comment: Pivot column from union arm (sc_kpe00201)
    display_name: Sc Kpe00201
  - name: sc_kpe00261
    expr: source.sc_kpe00261
    comment: Pivot column from union arm (sc_kpe00261)
    display_name: Sc Kpe00261
  - name: sc_kpe00213
    expr: source.sc_kpe00213
    comment: Pivot column from union arm (sc_kpe00213)
    display_name: Sc Kpe00213
  - name: sc_kpe00202
    expr: source.sc_kpe00202
    comment: Pivot column from union arm (sc_kpe00202)
    display_name: Sc Kpe00202
  - name: sc_kpe00262
    expr: source.sc_kpe00262
    comment: Pivot column from union arm (sc_kpe00262)
    display_name: Sc Kpe00262
  - name: sc_kpe00214
    expr: source.sc_kpe00214
    comment: Pivot column from union arm (sc_kpe00214)
    display_name: Sc Kpe00214

# ─── Base Measures (21) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

measures:
  - name: active_shift_hours
    expr: SUM(source.active_shift_hours)
    comment: Active shift hours
    display_name: Active Shift Hours

  - name: total_hours
    expr: SUM(source.total_hours)
    comment: Total hours
    display_name: Total Hours

  - name: paid_hours
    expr: SUM(source.paid_hours)
    comment: Paid hours
    display_name: Paid Hours

  - name: unpaid_hours
    expr: SUM(source.unpaid_hours)
    comment: Unpaid hours
    display_name: Unpaid Hours

  - name: theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed
    expr: SUM(source.theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed)
    comment: Theoretical line hours rated speed
    display_name: Theoretical Line Hours Rated Speed

  - name: epl
    expr: SUM(source.epl)
    comment: Epl
    display_name: Epl

  - name: opl
    expr: SUM(source.opl)
    comment: Opl
    display_name: Opl

  - name: co_and_cip
    expr: SUM(source.co_and_cip)
    comment: Co and cip
    display_name: Co And Cip

  - name: production_quantity
    expr: SUM(source.production_quantity)
    comment: Production quantity
    display_name: Production Quantity

  - name: production_quantity_phc
    expr: SUM(source.production_quantity_phc)
    comment: Production quantity phc
    display_name: Production Quantity Phc

  - name: theoretical_line_hours_restricted_speed
    expr: SUM(source.theoretical_line_hours_restricted_speed)
    comment: Theoretical line hours restricted speed
    display_name: Theoretical Line Hours Restricted Speed

  - name: hours_idleinactive
    expr: SUM(source.hours_idleinactive)
    comment: Hours idleinactive
    display_name: Hours Idleinactive

  - name: maintenance_and_setup
    expr: SUM(source.maintenance_and_setup)
    comment: Maintenance and setup
    display_name: Maintenance And Setup

  - name: scheduled_maintenance
    expr: SUM(source.scheduled_maintenance)
    comment: Scheduled maintenance
    display_name: Scheduled Maintenance

  - name: lineproduct_validation
    expr: SUM(source.lineproduct_validation)
    comment: Lineproduct validation
    display_name: Lineproduct Validation

  - name: lost_time
    expr: SUM(source.lost_time)
    comment: Lost time
    display_name: Lost Time

  - name: speed_losses
    expr: SUM(source.speed_losses)
    comment: Speed losses
    display_name: Speed Losses

  - name: minor_stoppages
    expr: SUM(source.minor_stoppages)
    comment: Minor stoppages
    display_name: Minor Stoppages

  - name: number_of_bb_stoppages
    expr: SUM(source.number_of_bb_stoppages)
    comment: Number of bb stoppages
    display_name: Number Of Bb Stoppages

  - name: total_downtime_hours
    expr: SUM(source.total_downtime_hours)
    comment: Total downtime hours
    display_name: Total Downtime Hours

  - name: plh_000_hidden
    expr: SUM(source.plh_000_hidden)
    comment: Plh 000 hidden
    display_name: Plh 000 Hidden

  # ─── DAX-Translated Measures (2) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

  - name: total_sle_actual
    expr: MEASURE(theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed)
    display_name: Total Sle Actual

  - name: asset_capacity_actual
    expr: MEASURE(active_shift_hours)
    display_name: Asset Capacity Actual

  # ─── SWITCH-Decomposed Measures (18) ────────────────────────────────────────────

  - name: sle_waterfall_installed_capacity
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Installed Capacity = 1.0 (100% baseline)"

  - name: sle_waterfall_non_scheduled_time
    expr: >-
      ((SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')) - SUM(source.active_shift_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Non-scheduled time / installed capacity"

  - name: sle_waterfall_asset_utilization
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.active_shift_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Asset Utilization = Asset_Capacity_Actual"

  - name: sle_waterfall_scheduled_maintenance
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.scheduled_maintenance) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Scheduled maintenance / installed capacity"

  - name: sle_waterfall_tech_projects
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.lineproduct_validation) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Tech projects and validation / installed capacity"

  - name: sle_waterfall_lost_time
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.lost_time) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Lost time / installed capacity"

  - name: sle_waterfall_output
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Output (rated-speed hours) / installed capacity"

  - name: sle_waterfall_paid_time
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.total_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Paid time / installed capacity"

  - name: sle_waterfall_maintenance_setup
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.maintenance_and_setup) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Maintenance & setup (CWC_FILTER) / paid time (WCT_CORE)"

  - name: sle_waterfall_cip
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.co_and_cip) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: C/O and CIP = CIP_Actual"

  - name: sle_waterfall_epl
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.epl) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: EPL (CWC_FILTER) / paid time (WCT_CORE)"

  - name: sle_waterfall_opl
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.opl) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: OPL (CWC_FILTER) / paid time (WCT_CORE)"

  - name: sle_waterfall_speed_losses
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.speed_losses) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Speed losses (CWC_FILTER) / paid time (WCT_CORE)"

  - name: sle_waterfall_minor_stoppages
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.minor_stoppages) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('PET', 'APET', 'RGB', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'NRGB', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: Minor stoppages (CWC_FILTER) / paid time (WCT_CORE)"

  - name: sle_waterfall_sle
    expr: >-
      (SUM(source.theoretical_line_hours_rated_speed) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'PMX', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'RGB', 'TNK', 'CHIPS FG'))) / NULLIF(SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'PMX', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'RGB', 'TNK', 'CHIPS FG')), 0)
    comment: "SLE Waterfall: System Line Efficiency = Total_SLE_Actual"

  - name: cip_actual
    expr: >-
      ((SUM(source.co_and_cip) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK')))) / NULLIF((SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))), 0)
    comment: "CIP Actual"

  - name: epl_actual
    expr: >-
      ((SUM(source.epl) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK')))) / NULLIF((SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))), 0)
    comment: "EPL Actual"

  - name: opl_actual
    expr: >-
      ((SUM(source.epl) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK')))) / NULLIF((SUM(source.paid_hours) FILTER (WHERE dim_wkctr.bic_cwc_type IN ('APET', 'CAN', 'HDPE FG', 'JUICE-BRICK', 'NRGB', 'PET', 'PMX', 'RGB', 'TNK'))), 0)
    comment: "OPL Actual"

"}}
